features: STYLISH ROUND DESIGN: The classic round shape and elegant gold screw lid provide a timeless, vintage look, perfect for preserving jams, honey, chutneys, and more
DURABLE GLASS CONSTRUCTION: Crafted from high-quality, transparent glass, this jar is built to last and offers a clear view of your homemade creations
SECURE GOLD SCREW LID: The gold screw lid ensures a tight, secure seal, keeping your contents fresh, safe from moisture, and free from air exposure
VERSATILE STORAGE: Ideal for storing a wide range of homemade goods like jam, honey, pickles, or even dry goods and spices. The 454ml (16oz) capacity is perfect for larger batches
PERFECT FOR GIFTING: A great choice for creating personalized gifts or showcasing homemade preserves, this jar adds a touch of charm to any kitchen or gift basket
description: Product Description Looking for the perfect pantry storage solution? Our 454g/16oz Gold Screw Top Jar is perfect for storing and organising spices, and herbs. It is also great for preserves, homemade jams, pickles and more! The Jar has a gold screw top lids which help to preserve contents for longer. This Jar can also be used for gifting homemade, preserves, jams and marmalades. This Jar is manufactured in the United Kingdom. Handwashing recommended. Avoid using in a Microwave or coming into direct contact with boiling water.From an extensive range of Kitchenware from Tala. Box Contains 1x Round Preserving Jar with Lead
